subcodes.first_line: The divine Joseph hath been cast into the well of hatred, whilst the world is encompassed by the darkness of heedlessness and ignorance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوسف الهی در بئر بغضا مبتلا عالم را ظلمت غفلت و نادانی احاطه نموده و جزاء
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
